## Checklist

- [ ] Agent prompts kept under ~800 words each
- [ ] New skills follow the `SKILL.md` + `scripts/` + `rules/` pattern
- [ ] CLAUDE.md updated if skill count or routing changed
- [ ] ACKNOWLEDGMENTS.md updated if inspired by external sources
- [ ] No breaking changes to artifact format (or `MAJOR` version bump)
